summary: Story Chain Progression System Enhancement testing completed. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all key elements: Dashboard 'Resume Your Story' section, My Stories page with progress bars, Story Chain View with progression header and AI suggestions panel, Photo to Comic page. AI suggestions feature tested and working - generates 3 context-aware suggestions.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/photo-to-comic/active-chains correctly returns chains with progress_pct, total_panels, continue_job_id, total_episodes, completed
GET /api/photo-to-comic/chain/{chain_id} returns progress_pct, total_panels, latest_continuable_job_id, flat timeline array
POST /api/photo-to-comic/chain/suggestions returns AI-generated suggestions with title, prompt, hook, type (escalation/twist/deepening)
GET /api/photo-to-comic/my-chains returns chains with progress_pct field for progress bars
Dashboard ResumeYourStory component displays primary chain with progress bar, episode count, CTAs
StoryChainView shows progression header (episodes + panels + %), progress bar, AI suggestions panel, timeline
MyStories page shows chain cards with progress bars and episode counts
PhotoToComic post-gen panel includes directions UI (continue-story-btn, direction-next/twist/escalate/custom)
NOTE: Test user has 3 avatar-mode chains (single image), not strip mode - so 'Next Episode' CTA and 'Add Episode' timeline CTA don't appear (correct behavior - only for strip mode)
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test user with 3 story chains (all avatar mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Chain Progression System features fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Dashboard 'Resume Your Story' section shows top 3 active chains with progress bars, episode counts, 'View Chain' and 'Timeline' CTAs. 2) GET /api/photo-to-comic/active-chains returns progress_pct, total_panels, continue_job_id. 3) Story Chain View page shows progression header with episode/panel counts and progress bar, 'Next Episode Ideas' AI panel with 'Get AI Ideas' button that generates 3 context-aware suggestions. 4) My Stories page shows all chains with progress bars. 5) PhotoToComic post-gen panel has direction options (Continue/Twist/Escalate/Custom). Note: 'Next Episode' CTA only appears for strip mode chains with continuable jobs - test user has avatar mode chains only.

dashboard_resume_your_story.note: resume-continue-btn (Next Episode) only shows for strip mode chains

fields_verified: Each suggestion has title, prompt, hook, type
type is one of: escalation, twist, deepening

story_chain_view_ui.note: next-episode-cta and add-episode-cta only show for strip mode chains

photo_to_comic_directions_ui.note: These appear in post-generation result state for strip mode only

suggestions_received: The Doppelganger Disaster! - Suddenly, everyone in town has an exact duplicate...
Secret Origin: revealed! - The main character discovers a hidden message...
The Forgotten Friendship - A long-lost childhood friend suddenly reappears...
